representatives.name: Mr Antonio Tsui
representatives.role: instructed by Huen & Cheung, assigned by DLA, for the accused in HCCC 316/2023

representatives.name: Ms Tso Yin-chee Denise
representatives.role: instructed by K Y Woo & Co LLP, assigned by DLA, for the 1st accused in HCCC 317/2023

representatives.name: Miss Emily Cheung
representatives.role: instructed by Wong & Tang, assigned by DLA, for the 2nd accused in HCCC 317/2023

charges.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug

offence_date.source: So has pleaded guilty to conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug, namely, cocaine with Fu, the defendant of 316/2023, and other persons unknown, between two dates, 1 and 2 October 2021 in Hong Kong.

offence_time.source: On 2 October 2021, at around 1.30 am, police officers patrolling near the Kwai Shing Circuit stopped and searched a taxi carrying the 1st defendant, So, as a passenger.

place_of_offence.address: near the Kwai Shing Circuit (taxi stopped and searched)
place_of_offence.source: On 2 October 2021, at around 1.30 am, police officers patrolling near the Kwai Shing Circuit stopped and searched a taxi carrying the 1st defendant, So, as a passenger.

cross_border.source: So has pleaded guilty to conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug ... between two dates, 1 and 2 October 2021 in Hong Kong.

trafficking_mode.source: She then proceeded to make deliveries as instructed all over Kowloon and New Territories.

roles_facts.source: She then proceeded to make deliveries as instructed all over Kowloon and New Territories.

reasons_for_offence.source: This friend’s mother offered her a job to make easy money, delivering drugs as instructed for $1,000 a day.

benefits_received.source: She also had HK$14,840 in cash

charges.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug

offence_date.source: Lam has pleaded guilty to conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug, namely, cocaine and cannabis in a herbal form with Fu, the defendant of 316/2023, and other persons unknown between 22 September and 3 October 2021, both dates inclusive, in Hong Kong.

place_of_offence.address: subdivided unit, 59 Prince Edward Road West, Mongkok (and staircase outside those premises)
place_of_offence.source: Whilst the police were searching this unit, the 2nd defendant, Lam, was found acting suspiciously on the staircase outside those premises by police officers.

cross_border.source: Lam has pleaded guilty ... between 22 September and 3 October 2021, both dates inclusive, in Hong Kong.

trafficking_mode.source: He was to take it back to the subdivided unit in Mongkok and repackage the drugs into smaller bags.

roles_facts.source: After his arrest ... he said he intended to go into those premises. He was searched and police found keys to the premises as well as five packets in his backpack containing a total of 118 grammes of a solid containing 103 grammes of cocaine.

reasons_for_offence.source: He told the police that both he and Fu met this Siu Wan who offered them both a way to make easy money.

charges.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug

offence_date.source: Fu now pleads guilty to conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug, namely, cocaine with So and Lam and other persons unknown between 1 and 2 October 2021 in Hong Kong.

place_of_offence.address: 59 Prince Edward Road West (met So there; boarded taxi)
place_of_offence.source: The defendant, Fu, instructed her to meet him at 59 Prince Edward Road West where he was to replenish her drug supply ... She said she met him in a taxi at about 7 pm at that location where he boarded and joined her.

cross_border.source: Fu now pleads guilty to conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug ... between 1 and 2 October 2021 in Hong Kong.

trafficking_mode.source: Apart from messages with So, the police found a WhatsApp group in Fu’s mobile showing members of the WhatsApp group sending out instructions of customers, their drug order, the price to pay and location of delivery. It would appear that he had made deliveries as well.

roles_facts.source: Apart from messages with So, the police found a WhatsApp group in Fu’s mobile showing members of the WhatsApp group sending out instructions of customers, their drug order, the price to pay and location of delivery.

reasons_for_offence.source: He told the police that both he and Fu met this Siu Wan who offered them both a way to make easy money.

offence_date.source: Fu now pleads guilty to trafficking in dangerous drugs on 3 October 2021 in Room F, 3rd Floor, 59 Prince Edward Road West, Mongkok, Hong Kong, he unlawfully trafficked in 7.2 grammes of a solid containing 6.19 grammes of cocaine and 6.12 grammes of cannabis in herbal form.

place_of_offence.address: Room F, 3rd Floor, 59 Prince Edward Road West, Mongkok, Hong Kong
place_of_offence.source: Fu now pleads guilty to trafficking in dangerous drugs on 3 October 2021 in Room F, 3rd Floor, 59 Prince Edward Road West, Mongkok, Hong Kong, he unlawfully trafficked in 7.2 grammes of a solid containing 6.19 grammes of cocaine and 6.12 grammes of cannabis in herbal form.

cross_border.source: Fu now pleads guilty to trafficking in dangerous drugs on 3 October 2021 in Room F, 3rd Floor, 59 Prince Edward Road West, Mongkok, Hong Kong...

trafficking_mode.source: After his arrest, Fu revealed a drug storage premises in Mongkok to the police. They searched the premises and found 41 plastic bags containing a total of 7.2 grammes of a solid containing 6.19 grammes of cocaine and two plastic bags containing a total of 6.12 grammes of cannabis in herbal form.

roles_facts.source: After his arrest, Fu revealed a drug storage premises in Mongkok to the police. They used keys found on Fu to gain access to the premises.

reasons_for_offence.source: He told the police that both he and Fu met this Siu Wan who offered them both a way to make easy money.
